nasb.text: And the woman took a covering and spread it over the well’s mouth and scattered grain on it, so that nothing was known.

esv.text: And the woman took and spread a covering over the well’s mouth and scattered grain on it, and nothing was known of it.

cnv.text: 那家的主婦拿了一塊大布，蓋在井口上，又在上面鋪了一些麥子，所以沒有人知道這件事。

ccb.text: 那家的妇人用盖子盖上井口，然后在上面撒了一些麦子，没有人知道这件事。
